2980349.title: Little Mix: MTV Live From Fusion..
2980349.description: ... Festival 2019. Coverage from this year's Fusion Festival, where headliners Little Mix took to the stage to perform their hits including 'Salute', 'Power' and 'Woman Like Me'.
